request.instructions: Label the sentiment of the following tweet as Positive, Negative, or Neutral. Choose exactly one label.
request.rubric: Positive: clearly favourable tone. Negative: clearly unfavourable tone. Neutral: factual or mixed. Do not use sub-labels.
request.taskContent: Just upgraded to the new phone and I absolutely love it! The camera quality is incredible.
request.userNotes: Strong positive language throughout, no mixed signals.

response.recommendedAnswer:
Positive

Justification: The tweet uses strong positive language ("absolutely love it", "incredible") with no negative or neutral counterpoints.
response.reasoningSummary: Clear positive sentiment. No ambiguity. Single label matches rubric requirements.
rubricChecklist: Format compliance: pass — single label on first line
Instruction match: pass — 'Positive' chosen from provided options
Hallucination risk: pass — no external facts assumed
Missing evidence: pass — content is self-contained
Domain expertise risk: pass — general knowledge sufficient
Answer-option consistency: pass — 'Positive' is one of the provided options
